# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write a Helm chart that includes an Ingress resource for our application. Configure the ingress to accept traffic from any hostname for flexibility across different environments (dev, staging, prod). We'll configure TLS certificates later when we move to production.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
   name: my-ingress  # Define the ingress resource's name, replace "my-app" with your app or service Name in Kubernetes context
spec:
    tls:                   
     - hosts:                # The host/domain names for which TLS is enabled. Modify this as per requirement (e.g., dev.example.com staging.example.com prod.example.com) 
       - my-app   # replace with your application name or service in Kubernetes context   
     secretName: tls-certs          # Name of the Secret containing TLS certificate and key files for HTTPS connection
